content: 现在请你 review 这个 Next.js 项目的**后端** /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty-cli/apps/swifty-agent 到这个 Go 项目 /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent 的迁移工作Go 项目可能存在 bug, 可能存在未对齐项目1. 前端工程你**不需要关注** (Next.js 项目的前端 /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty-cli/apps/swifty-agent/app, Go 项目的前端 /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/fe)2. 一对一详细 review Next.js 项目的**后端**到 Go 项目的迁移工作, 不要遗漏**任何**的细节, 找到所有的 bug、未对齐项目等等3. 输出你的 review 结论到本地文件: code-review-${你的名字}.md4. 请你组建 Agent Team, 创建 3 个 teammates 详细 review 迁移工作

Review complete! The report has been saved to `code-review-swifty.md` (635 lines).

## Summary

The migration from Next.js to Go has **19 issues** across 4 severity levels:

### Critical (P0) - 4 issues
1. **JSON field name mismatch** (`chat_handler.go:20-22`) — Uses uppercase `Id`/`Question` instead of lowercase `id`/`question`, causing request parsing failures
2. **`log.Fatal` in tools** (8 locations) — Tool functions using `log.Fatal` will crash the entire HTTP service process
3. **stdin blocking in mysql_crud** (`mysql_crud.go:38-44`) — HTTP service mode has no stdin, causing tool calls to hang indefinitely
4. **Prometheus tool disabled** (`query_metrics_alerts.go:54-56`) — Function returns early with dead code, functionality completely unavailable

### High (P1) - 4 issues
5. Hardcoded log topic values instead of environment-based config
6. Output format mismatch (plain text vs markdown)
7. File directory default mismatch (`./docs` vs `./data/docs`)
8. Model name mismatch (`deepseek-v3-2-251201` vs `openai-v3-2-251201`)

### Medium (P2) - 6 issues
9. Redis vector field name mismatch (`vector_content` vs `vector`)
10. Missing LRU eviction in memory management
11. Missing Redis reconnection mechanism
12. Missing Redis index dimension mismatch detection
13. Variable name shadowing in `tools_node.go`
14. `ai_ops` handler not using event stream pattern

### Low (P3) - 5 issues
15. No test files
16. Unstructured logging
17. No conversation memory persistence
18. DuckDuckGo search tool not integrated (dead code)
19. Missing infrastructure files (README, Makefile, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml)

**Recommendation**: Fix all P0 and P1 issues before deployment. The most critical is the JSON field name mismatch, which will cause all chat requests to fail with 400 errors.
